texto: Thousands of years hath the sun rose, In the glow of its Eastern hues,Thousands of years doth the West close It in gloom, and in tears, of its dews.Even so, in the Orient morning, Faith, true! – pure, of Allah, The One,Rose, Earth, with its beauty, adorning, And sank, Westward – and darkened, its sun.O, Believers! Have faith in Faith’s morning, Know ye, Allah knoweth the best!See, the Light of the Orient, returning Pure Islamic beams, over the West
explicacao: Citação de William Ubeidullah Cunliffe sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Thousands of years hath the sun rose, In the glow of its Eastern hues,Thousands of years doth the…” articula reflexao, islam, faith em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como bom-dia e reflexao-noturna.
